poses.name: Standing Front Full 01
poses.prompt: standing upright, facing camera, balanced weight, arms relaxed by sides

poses.name: Standing Contrapposto 01
poses.prompt: standing contrapposto, one hip dropped, relaxed shoulders, soft arm bend

poses.name: Standing Profile 01
poses.prompt: standing in profile, torso slightly turned, chin angled toward camera

poses.name: Portrait Neutral 01
poses.prompt: head and shoulders portrait, neutral expression, direct camera gaze

poses.name: Portrait Over Shoulder 01
poses.prompt: portrait over shoulder, torso turned away, face back toward camera

poses.name: Portrait Closeup 01
poses.prompt: tight closeup portrait, face filling frame, calm expression

poses.name: Sitting Chair Front 01
poses.prompt: sitting on chair, knees forward, back upright, hands resting on thighs

poses.name: Sitting Side 01
poses.prompt: sitting sideways on chair, torso turned to camera, legs together

poses.name: Sitting Floor 01
poses.prompt: sitting on floor, one knee bent, one leg extended, hands braced lightly

poses.name: Kneeling Upright 01
poses.prompt: kneeling upright, torso tall, hands resting softly near lap

poses.name: Kneeling Turn 01
poses.prompt: kneeling with torso turned, one hand on hip, other hand relaxed

poses.name: Floor Recline 01
poses.prompt: reclining on floor, upper body lifted on forearm, legs angled diagonally

poses.name: Floor Side 01
poses.prompt: lying on side, elbow supporting upper body, gaze toward camera

poses.name: Floor Curled 01
poses.prompt: curled seated floor pose, knees drawn in, arms wrapped loosely

poses.name: Walking Stride 01
poses.prompt: captured mid-stride, one leg forward, natural arm swing, forward energy

poses.name: Turning Motion 01
poses.prompt: turning through frame, torso twisting, hair and clothing showing motion
